name: genmedia-ui
description: Companion skills for Mission Control (genmedia-ui) — the shared storyboard between you and a Claude Code agent generating media with the genmedia CLI.

plugins.name: storyboard
plugins.description: The storyboard.json contract: schema, takes/<scene-id>/ download convention, async pending[] tracking, the UI's direction queue, and the re-read-before-generating habit.
